---
title: "02a_ADNI_ADRC_harmonized (fixed)"
author: "automated-patch"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: pdf_document
---

# 1. Setup

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
base_dir <- here::here("Proteomics")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = base_dir)

# Ensure directories exist
results_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "results")
plots_dir <- file.path(results_dir, "plots")
dir.create(results_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(plots_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r libs, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
pkgs <- c("sva", "limma", "openxlsx", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "ggrepel")

# Install missing packages
for(pk in pkgs){
  if(!requireNamespace(pk, quietly = TRUE)){
    message("Installing missing package: ", pk)
    if(pk %in% c("sva", "limma")){
      if(!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")
      BiocManager::install(pk, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
    } else {
      install.packages(pk)
    }
  }
}

lapply(pkgs, library, character.only = TRUE)
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

# 2. Load Data

```{r load-data}
# Load data from results directory (assumed output from step 00)
pheno_file <- file.path(results_dir, "PhenoInfo_numeric.xlsx")
proto_file <- file.path(results_dir, "ProtoData_filtered.xlsx")

if(!file.exists(pheno_file)) stop("Phenotype file not found: ", pheno_file)
if(!file.exists(proto_file)) stop("Proteomics file not found: ", proto_file)

PhenoInfo_numeric <- read.xlsx(pheno_file)
ProtoData_filtered <- read.xlsx(proto_file)

# Clean SampleIDs
ProtoData_filtered <- ProtoData_filtered %>%
  rename(SampleID = 1) %>%
  mutate(SampleID = trimws(SampleID))
 
PhenoInfo_numeric <- PhenoInfo_numeric %>%
  rename(SampleID = 1) %>%
  mutate(SampleID = trimws(SampleID))

# Set Row Names for phenotype
rownames(PhenoInfo_numeric) <- PhenoInfo_numeric$SampleID
PhenoInfo_numeric <- PhenoInfo_numeric %>% select(-SampleID)

# Ensure Cohort is a factor for ComBat
if("Cohort" %in% colnames(PhenoInfo_numeric)){
  PhenoInfo_numeric$Cohort <- as.factor(PhenoInfo_numeric$Cohort)
} else {
  stop("Column 'Cohort' missing from phenotype data.")
}
```

# 3. Prepare Expression Matrix

```{r prep-matrix}
# Convert to strictly numeric matrix (ComBat requirement)
# Remove non-numeric columns (SampleID, drawDate, Panel.OLINK if present)
cols_to_remove <- c("SampleID", "drawDate", "Panel.OLINK")
expr_data_for_matrix <- ProtoData_filtered %>% select(-any_of(cols_to_remove))

expr_matrix <- as.matrix(sapply(expr_data_for_matrix, as.numeric))
rownames(expr_matrix) <- ProtoData_filtered$SampleID 
 
# Transpose (Proteins as Rows, Samples as Columns for ComBat)
expr_matrix_transposed <- t(expr_matrix)

# Handle NAs: Remove proteins that are all NA
all_na_rows <- which(rowSums(is.na(expr_matrix_transposed)) == ncol(expr_matrix_transposed))
if(length(all_na_rows) > 0) {
    expr_matrix_clean <- expr_matrix_transposed[-all_na_rows, ]
    message(paste("Removed", length(all_na_rows), "proteins that were all NA."))
} else {
    expr_matrix_clean <- expr_matrix_transposed
}
```

# 4. Alignment and Batch Correction (ComBat)

```{r combat}
# --- CRITICAL ALIGNMENT ---
# 1. Define the exact order of samples from the clean matrix
sample_order <- colnames(expr_matrix_clean)

# 2. Use match() to find the index of these samples in the phenotype data
match_index <- match(sample_order, rownames(PhenoInfo_numeric))
if(any(is.na(match_index))) stop("Some samples in expression data not found in phenotype data.")

# 3. Create the phenotype data frame and batch vector in the correct, guaranteed order
pheno_combat <- PhenoInfo_numeric[match_index, ]
batch_vector <- pheno_combat$Cohort 

# Null Model: Adjust only for the batch variable (Cohort)
mod_null <- model.matrix(~1, data = pheno_combat)

# PCA Before Correction
pca_before <- prcomp(t(expr_matrix_clean), scale. = TRUE)
pca_df_before <- data.frame(
  PC1 = pca_before$x[, 1],
  PC2 = pca_before$x[, 2],
  Cohort = pheno_combat$Cohort
)

p_before <- ggplot(pca_df_before, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Cohort)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ggtitle("PCA Before ComBat") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

ggsave(filename = file.path(plots_dir, "PCA_Before_Batch_Correction.png"), plot = p_before, width = 8, height = 6)

# Run ComBat
combat_adjusted_matrix <- ComBat(
    dat = expr_matrix_clean, 
    batch = batch_vector, 
    mod = mod_null,
    par.prior = TRUE, 
    prior.plots = FALSE 
)

# Transpose back (Samples as Rows, Proteins as Columns)
Proto_Combat_Adjusted <- as.data.frame(t(combat_adjusted_matrix))

# Assign to final variable name expected by downstream scripts
Proto_combat_z <- Proto_Combat_Adjusted 
```

# 5. Save Results

```{r save}
# Save Excel output
write.xlsx(Proto_combat_z, file.path(results_dir, "ADNI_ADRC_Proteomics_Combat_Adjusted_Zscored.xlsx"), rowNames = TRUE)

# Save RData for WGCNA step
# IMPORTANT: Must save 'pheno_combat' and 'Proto_combat_z'
save(pheno_combat, Proto_combat_z, file = file.path(results_dir, "02_output.RData"))

message("Harmonization complete. Saved 02_output.RData to ", results_dir)
```
